title: Candid Summer Instant Film Street Photo AI
sourceTitle: Candid Summer Instant Film Street Photo AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Candid summer street photography in instant-film style featuring adult woman in navy cap, oversized light-gray shirt, white tank, denim jeans, iced coffee and vintage compact camera, set in tree-lined city street with cafes, parked cars, storefronts, bright midday sunlight. Subject: adult woman in navy cap, oversized light-gray shirt, white tank, denim jeans, iced coffee and vintage compact camera is the adult candid lifestyle subject, styled for relaxed summer street fashion with natural makeup, soft expression, casual gesture, iced drink or compact camera prop, and effortless travel-diary energy. Scene: tree-lined city street with cafes, parked cars, storefronts, bright midday sunlight creates the tree-lined urban summer environment with cafes, storefronts, parked cars, sidewalk detail, dappled sunlight, shallow depth of field, and authentic candid city atmosphere. Composition: Fixed 9:16 vertical phone-friendly instant-film photograph: spontaneous street movement, thick white Polaroid-style border, candid pose variation, subject framed naturally in the city street, and imperfect travel-diary snapshot feel. Signature Elements: Navy cap, relaxed oversized shirt or linen layer, denim, iced coffee, vintage compact camera, tree-lined city street, cafe storefronts, thick white instant-film border, candid movement, and summer travel diary mood. Style: Ultra-realistic lifestyle photography with instant film / Polaroid look, candid summer street fashion, natural moment, bright midday sunlight through trees, shallow depth of field, cinematic urban background, and relaxed SNS travel diary finish. Color Palette: Warm summer daylight palette with navy, light gray, white, denim blue, brown leather, green tree shadows, cafe neutrals, soft film whites, and gentle instant-film color warmth. Lighting: Bright midday sunlight filtered through trees, dappled sidewalk shadows, soft face highlights, natural city reflections, and mild instant-film exposure bloom without washing out the subject. Camera: Candid handheld street-photo camera with vertical crop, slight snapshot imperfection, shallow depth of field, natural subject motion, and thick white instant-film border. Typography: Multiple poses and expressions: • Looking back and flashing a peace sign • Adjusting baseball cap shyly • Sipping iced coffee while gazing away • Leaning playfully stays small and limited to the instant-film border when present; Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
